data.title: Thorney Opportunities Ltd’s Diverse Portfolio and Strong Dividends

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Thorney Opportunities Ltd (TOP), a listed investment company on the ASX, reported a slight dip in its November portfolio performance, while its investment strategy focuses on unlocking value in undervalued companies. Despite a decrease in net tangible assets per share from the previous month, TOP remains active in its share buyback program and continues to offer a healthy dividend yield. With a diverse portfolio spanning sectors like media, energy, and financials, TOP aims to provide shareholders with strong returns and fully franked dividends.

data.title: Electric Royalties Launches C$4 Million Private Placement
data.description:
Electric Royalties (TSE:ELEC) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Electric Royalties Ltd. is set to raise up to C$4 million through a private placement, offering investors a chance to capitalize on the growing demand for electric vehicle and renewable energy commodities. The proceeds will support its acquisition of a royalty related to a Chilean copper mine, enhancing its diverse portfolio tied to the electrification revolution.

  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Boss Energy Ltd has seen a decrease in voting power from one of its substantial shareholders, Australian Retirement Trust Pty Ltd, whose stake dropped from 6.171% to 5.125%.
